bottleneck: barrier stall 24.33%: consumer waits for TMA completion via full[stage].wait(full[stage].arrive()). The arrive+wait combined loses the opportunity to do useful work (like signaling empty[prev_stage]) while waiting.
idea: Split full[stage].arrive() from full[stage].wait(token) to allow useful work between them: arrive first, then signal empty[prev_stage].arrive() to unblock producer, then wait for full. This overlaps producer unblocking with TMA wait, potentially reducing pipeline stall cycles.
expected_gain: Reduce pipeline stall by overlapping empty.arrive with full.wait, potentially 1-5 TFLOPS
